items.title: Request lifecycle
items.text: A request moves from DNS resolution to a TCP handshake, then to an HTTP exchange. Keep payloads small and cacheable when possible.

items.title: Status codes
items.text: Use 2xx for success, 4xx for client errors, and 5xx for server errors.

items.title: Migration checklist
items.text: Always run migrations in a staging environment first and keep rollback scripts ready.

items.title: Naming conventions
items.text: Use descriptive, domain-focused component names and keep them small and composable.
